query: "water boils" song OR movie OR book

results.title: water - Wiktionary
results.snippet: A substance (of molecular formula H₂O) found at room temperature and pressure as a clear liquid; it is present naturally as rain, and found in rivers, lakes and seas; its solid form is ice and its gaseous form is steam. | The aforementioned liquid, considered one of the Classical elements or basic elements of alchemy. | Water in a body; an area of open water.
